description: TaskFlow per-service scaling and resource monitoring: API, Web, MongoDB
title: TaskFlow - Autoscaling & Performance

spec.title: API Pods (Running)
spec.description: Current number of running taskflow-api pods

spec.title: Web Pods (Running)
spec.description: Current number of running taskflow-web pods

spec.title: MongoDB Pods (Running)
spec.description: Current number of running taskflow-mongo pods

spec.title: Total Pods (All Services)
spec.description: Total pods running across all taskflow services

spec.title: API Pods (Desired)
spec.description: Desired number of API pods (HPA target replicas)

spec.title: Web Pods (Desired)
spec.description: Desired number of Web pods (HPA target replicas)

spec.title: MongoDB Pods (Desired)
spec.description: Desired number of MongoDB pods (StatefulSet spec replicas)

spec.title: Total Pods (Desired)
spec.description: Total desired pods across all services (HPA desired + MongoDB replicas)

spec.title: API HPA — CPU Trigger (current vs 60% threshold)
spec.description: Shows API CPU utilization vs the 60% HPA trigger threshold. When current crosses threshold, new pods are provisioned.

spec.title: API HPA — Memory Trigger (current vs 80% threshold)
spec.description: Shows API memory utilization vs the 80% HPA trigger threshold.

spec.title: API Pod Count Over Time (HPA scaling)
spec.description: Tracks API pod count over time alongside HPA desired replicas — shows scale-out/in events

spec.title: CPU Usage Per Service (Cores)
spec.description: Actual CPU core usage by service. HPA trigger line = live pod count × 0.12 cores (60% of 200m request per API pod). HPA scale events shown as red annotations.

spec.legendFormat: API HPA Trigger (60% avg — scales here)

matcher.options: API HPA Trigger (60% avg — scales here)

spec.title: Memory Usage Per Service
spec.description: Memory working set broken down by service (API, Web, MongoDB)

spec.title: CPU Usage Per API Pod (Cores)
spec.description: Per-pod CPU in actual cores. The orange dashed line is 0.12 cores (60% of 200m request) — when the AVERAGE across pods crosses this, HPA scales out. Red annotations = scale events.

spec.legendFormat: HPA Trigger per pod (0.12 cores = 60% of 200m)

matcher.options: HPA Trigger per pod (0.12 cores = 60% of 200m)
